loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing month-to-date cumulative energy for outgoing feeders; nameplate capacity and subsidy limits are not measured for this panel.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing energy trends for UPS, BPDP, and HHF feeders; Rated and Contracted lines are blank as nameplate ratings are unknown for this asset.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing total apparent power (kVA) and active/reactive power (kW/kVAr) for the panel's outgoing feeders; rated capacity, load factor, and worst peak markers are omitted because the member meters lack the required nameplate ratings or load factor columns.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing daily power demand by feeder (UPS, BPDB, HHF) — per-feeder breakdown is aggregated from the panel's member meters (GIC-01-N3-UPS-01, GIC-01-N8-BPDB-01, etc.) via the roster fan-out, not from this panel's own stub table.
